title: Chef Aid 20cm Stainless Steel Filleting Knife with Soft Grip Handle,Black (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
CARBON STEEL: With A Super Sharp Carbon Steel Blade this Chef Aid Filleting Knife will make most Kitchen Prep tasks an effortless task
COMFORT: The handles on the Chef Aid range of Knives have been designed to fit comfortably in your hand for ease of use and the Soft Grip Hanldes ensure further comfort when in use
MULTI-USE: This Knife is perfect for Filleting and Shaping all types of Meat and Fish and can also be great for many other Kitchen Tasks
HANDWASHING SUGGESTED: To preserve and ensure a perfect cut everytime it is suggested to handwash the Knifes after use
CHEF AID offers an extensive range of products for the Kitchen and Home that are affordable without compromising on quality
